title: dryopteris excelsa
intro: Dryopteris excelsa, also known as the golden shield fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Dryopteris excelsa include its ability to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various conditions such as arthritis, digestive issues, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Dryopteris excelsa can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to reap its benefits.
